code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

let t_opt = io.read_line()
let t = match t_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)
mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_token
        let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
        if tok == t
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_token
  let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
  if tok == t
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("count=#{count}")
